description: src/features/knowledge-engine has no dedicated Resources domain. The best existing canonical vocabulary to reuse here is features/business-dna's own Resources section categories. Source of truth: src/features/business-dna/types/sections/resources.ts → BUSINESS_DNA_RESOURCE_CATEGORY_KEYS (7 values). Only 2 of these 7 map onto business-engine's ResourceType (article/guide/video/playbook/checklist — src/features/business-engine/schemas/enums.ts): 'checklists'→'checklist' and 'youtube'→'video'. The other 5 ('books', 'courses', 'communities', 'templates', 'documents') have no ResourceType equivalent — see features/business-dna/README.md's mapping table for the same note.
